calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-02-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-02-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Noreen Ikeuye.
Atty. Michael K. Sipes, appearance for Plaintiff California Service Bureau Inc.
Antonio Fonseca appeared as witness for the Plaintiff in behalf of Seton Medical Center.
No appearance by the Defendant Linda F. Williams.
After hearing the tetimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Linda F. Williams as follows:
Principal $1,043.74.
Prejudgment Interest $527.44
Attorneys' Fees $260.75
Costs $245.00, for a total of $2,076.93
Counsel to submit propose judgment.

Oct. 20, 2006
Judgment signed by VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-17-2006 Set For Trial On Oct-02-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
